limitations: No quantified AI-attributable investment amounts disclosed; AI investment intensity scored 2 based on named governance structures and stated cautious adoption posture, but no named AI programs, products, or dollar commitments appear in the excerpts.
AI narrative concreteness scored 3 because named governance bodies and policies are described, but no deployed AI use cases with operational detail or metrics are disclosed.

AI risk disclosure scored 4 because multiple company-specific risk mechanisms are described (cybersecurity attack sophistication, cost inflation from AI hardware demand, IP risks, regulatory compliance costs), with named oversight bodies (Cybersecurity Committee, AI Steering Committee), but no quantified risk exposure or formal mitigation program metrics are provided.
